subcodes.first_line: O beloved of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Two of your letters arrived in quick succession. The contents of one detailed the false document [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء دو طغرا نامه شما پی در پی رسید مضمون یکی تفصیل لایحه مزوره
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @review of publications
